Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
✨ Add complete Student Sync System with dynamic activity titles

🎯 Features implemented:
- Dynamic student HTML generation from Google Sheets
- Column L → Vocabulary Tab (iframe embedding)
- Column M → Finished Activities (comma-separated HTML links)
- Column N → Learning Objectives (text content)
- Dynamic activity titles extracted from URL paths
- Clean, interactive activity cards with hover effects
- Automatic sync functionality (manual and auto modes)

🔧 Technical improvements:
- Robust CSV parsing with proper quote handling
- Error handling and fallback mechanisms
- Mobile-responsive design
- Professional styling with glass morphism effects

📊 Working URLs transform to clean titles:
- papers-please → Papers Please
- unlimited-power → Unlimited Power
- incentive-schemes → Incentive Schemes

🚀 Ready for production use with reliable Google Sheets integration

🤖 Generated with Claude Code

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")

- Column L → Vocabulary, Column M → Activities, Column N → Objectives

- Improved CSV parsing and error handling

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
